deep_dive.title: Covariance Shrinkage via Stochastic Interpolation
deep_dive.abstract: We recast classical shrinkage of high-dimensional covariance estimators as empirical risk minimization over a parametric stochastic interpolant between a source and a target distribution. This formalism recovers known shrinkage estimators as special cases and reveals three distinct mechanisms for reducing statistical risk: (i) Scheduling: the interpolant schedule determines the class of admissible covariances, and hence the achievable risk. (ii) Flow maps and couplings: whereas naive constructions amount to assuming independence between the distributions, specific coupling structures (e.g., solutions of optimal transport problems) can lower the empirical risk. Moreover, non-linear flow maps realizing such couplings free the interpolant covariance from the eigenbasis of the empirical estimate, enabling eigenvector regularization. (iii) Early stopping: estimators defined by integrating a regressed vector field afford an additional bias-variance trade-off through approximation of the true interpolant distribution. We then propose a neural estimator of the interpolant, together with an upper bound on its quadratic risk in terms of the interpolant approximation error, and validate both on synthetic experiments. Finally, we apply the estimator to real neuroimaging data, demonstrating the additional regularization power this approach offers in practice.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: stochastic interpolant between source and target distributions, akin to diffusion bridge
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 源和目标分布之间的随机插值，类似扩散桥
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 源和目标分布之间的随机插值，类似扩散桥
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 源和目标分布之间的随机插值，类似扩散桥
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Recasts covariance shrinkage as stochastic interpolation between source and target distributions, revealing connections to optimal transport and flow maps.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 将高维协方差收缩问题重新表述为源分布和目标分布之间的参数化随机插值，该框架统一了传统收缩估计量，并揭示了调度、流映射和最优传输耦合等三种风险降低机制。该方法直接对应了扩散桥连接两个分布的核心思想，为协方差估计提供了新的理论视角。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 将高维协方差收缩问题重新表述为源分布和目标分布之间的参数化随机插值，该框架统一了传统收缩估计量，并揭示了调度、流映射和最优传输耦合等三种风险降低机制。该方法直接对应了扩散桥连接两个分布的核心思想，为协方差估计提供了新的理论视角。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: diffusion bridge connecting two probability distributions

quick_skim.title: Strong Stochastic Flow Maps
quick_skim.abstract: Flow and diffusion models generate high-quality samples in many modalities; however, many network evaluations are required during inference due to numerical integration of an underlying differential equation. Flow maps alleviate this problem by learning the solution map of the differential equation directly, enabling few-step sampling. Yet, current methods are restricted to approximating the solution map of ODEs. These methods can be used to learn the transition kernel of an SDE, thereby obtaining a solution map that recovers the marginal distributions of the process (weak convergence) rather than the solution path (strong convergence). We propose Strong Stochastic Flow Maps (SSFMs) as a novel framework for learning the strong solution map of additive-noise SDEs, directly generalizing deterministic flow maps to the stochastic setting. Further, a polynomial approximation to Brownian motion is introduced and shown to converge pathwise. These results enable a simulation-free training objective for the solution map of diffusion models. We demonstrate that SSFMs outperform previous stochastic flow map methods on image generation and enable few-step sampling of molecular systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: learns strong solution map of SDEs for generative modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 学习SDE的强解映射用于生成建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 学习SDE的强解映射用于生成建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 学习SDE的强解映射用于生成建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Strong Stochastic Flow Maps to learn the strong solution map of additive-noise SDEs, enabling few-step sampling while preserving pathwise convergence.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有流映射方法仅限于ODE解映射且只能实现弱收敛的问题，提出强随机流映射（SSFMs）框架，通过学习加性噪声SDE的强解映射，在保留路径级强收敛性的同时实现少步采样。该方法直接推广确定性流映射，为生成建模提供更高效的采样途径。实验验证了其在保持高样本质量下的计算加速。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有流映射方法仅限于ODE解映射且只能实现弱收敛的问题，提出强随机流映射（SSFMs）框架，通过学习加性噪声SDE的强解映射，在保留路径级强收敛性的同时实现少步采样。该方法直接推广确定性流映射，为生成建模提供更高效的采样途径。实验验证了其在保持高样本质量下的计算加速。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: stochastic bridge processes for generative modeling
